title: Markdown formatting is preserved verbatim on save

testCases.given: a note containing headings, bullet lists, ordered lists, links, inline code, and fenced code blocks
testCases.when: the user saves and reopens the note
testCases.then: the markdown source is byte-identical to the input

testCases.given: a note containing unicode (emoji, CJK, RTL characters)
testCases.when: the user saves and reopens the note
testCases.then: all unicode codepoints are preserved verbatim
